title: GeekAI v4.2.6 已经发布，AI 助手全套开源解决方案
content:
GeekAI v4.2.6 已经发布，AI 助手全套开源解决方案。 v4.2.6
功能重构：优化系统配置管理功能，把 OSS，支付，短信，邮件等配置全部迁移到管理后台，无需通过修改配置文档的方式修改
功能优化：重构 API 授权代码，采用中间件鉴权方式，实现更加精准的 API 鉴权
功能优化：优化 PC 端的 Suno 音乐，视频生成，以及即梦 AI 页面 UI
功能优化：重构登录和注册页面，兼容移动端和 PC 端，并且所有的登录组件共用了同一套组件代码，大大降低维护成本
功能优化：管理后台增加模型批量删除功能
功能优化：优化 Table 组件…
source: 开源中国-全部 - Gitee快讯

title: 微信公众号打击自动化 AI 创作行为
content: WeChat’s public‑platform rules now prohibit “non‑human automated creation.” The new guidelines state that content generated by AI or other automated means without human authorship violates three key red lines. Accounts that post such material will face tiered penalties based on severity. The move signals a return to “content is king,” requiring creators to keep human oversight and emotional input when using tools.

title: 宇树机器人 R1 现身阿里西溪园区，有望合作「树卖通」项目
content: Yu Shu Technology’s newest robot, the R1, was showcased at Alibaba's Xijie Park as part of an impending partnership between the two companies. The robot is prepared for the “Tree Sell-Through” project, which Alibaba plans to announce during a Shenzhen branding conference in mid‑April. Analysts suggest the project links to Alibaba’s AliExpress, where Yu Shu opened a store in March 2025. In January, over 50 brands joined AliExpress’s “Super Brand Overseas Plan,” and the platform is targeting large‑scale overseas expansion and managed logistics by 2026.

title: 恶意诋毁蚂蚁集团，网络大 V 臧其超等被判赔偿 150 万
content: The Zhejiang High Court ruled that several online figures, including influencer Zang Qichao, must pay Ant Group 1.5 million yuan for commercial defamation and unfair competition. The judgment upheld the original verdict, ordering the seven defendants to cease the defamatory practices and jointly compensate Ant Group. Zang, who runs a large MCN with over 500 accounts and 100 million followers, repeatedly attacked Ant Pay. Many of his offending accounts had been permanently banned before the judgment. Ant Pay, part of Alibaba’s ecosystem, began as Alipay in 2004.

title: 老铺黄金挖角空少空姐：年薪最高 45.5 万
content: Lao Pu Golden is recruiting store‑customer service managers with at least six years of airline cabin crew experience and three years as a senior flight attendant. Positions at the Hangzhou and Shanghai locations require a flight‑crew background, offering monthly salaries of 25,000–35,000 yuan. The retailer previously preferred flight‑crew candidates for sales roles, valuing their customer‑friendly demeanor. The company’s high salaries and focus on aviation talent align with a luxury‑service strategy and reflect a shift in gold retail toward premium experiences.

title: Anthropic 完成要约收购 员工愿意出售的股份数量有限
content: Anthropic employees completed an earlier stock sell‑off, but the amount sold was limited, so some investors could not purchase all available shares. The offer was priced at the same valuation as the company’s February Series B round—$350 billion (excluding the newly raised $30 billion). Anthropic did not comment. The total transaction value was not disclosed and was below the $6 billion investors had planned to buy. Several current and former employees plan to hold more shares ahead of Anthropic’s anticipated IPO this year.

title: Moving from WordPress to Jekyll (and static site generators in general)
content: The post explains why a developer might switch from WordPress to Jekyll or another static site generator, outlining the benefits of faster load times, improved security, and greater control over site code. It also discusses the challenges of migration, such as re‑creating dynamic features, adjusting workflows, and learning new tools. The author weighs the trade‑offs between the flexibility of WordPress and the efficiency of static offerings.

title: 量子计算领域的竞争正处于白热化阶段
content: The competition in quantum computing is intensifying. Major companies and research institutions are investing heavily in developing practical, large‑scale quantum processors. Advances in qubit coherence, error correction, and scalable architectures are accelerating progress. As a result, the race to achieve useful quantum advantage has become highly competitive, with substantial funding, talent, and technological breakthroughs driving rapid development across the field.

title: You’re a Real Software Developer Only If…
content: The article recounts the author’s recent successful jsDay 2026 talk and a delayed trip to Munich that forced extra prep and cardio. It then humorously lists traits that prove you’re a real software developer, such as breaking production, fixing bugs by accident, debugging with frustration, writing code that fails in production, dropping databases, declaring “It works on my machine,” and blaming both backend and frontend during a single session. The list invites readers to add their own experiences.

title: Java 性能比我们的预期中高了四倍，gzb-one 证明了它（一份严谨的压测报告）
content:
前言 我进行测试的目的是什么？

我想证明 java的性能上限 不等于 各大框架的性能上限，甚至天差地别

java 并不慢，gzb-one 在本次测试中 已经证明了这些，就算面对一些静态语言框架也未必不能 一较长短

当然 gzb-one 绝对也不是最优解，一定存在一些 性能更加极致 且保持和spring一样易用性的框架，只是他们或许并不公开（TFB榜单的发包机不算框架）

我不是为了打败谁（虽然客观上是这样），至少在生态成熟性上，目前还做不到

前几天我发布了帖子

前几天发布了一个帖子，咨询大家怎么压测才能获取更可靠的数据…

title: The "Stateless" AI Era is a Massive Engineering Tax
content: MLH criticizes the prevailing “stateless” AI approach, arguing that it forces developers to waste 80 % of their time on fragile session and memory systems. The article proposes using Backboard.io—a stateful API that stores memory, manages RAG, and supports over 17,000 models—to simplify state management and avoid costly rewrites. MLH will partner with Backboard.io for 12 months, offering free state management and dev credits to participants, and will evaluate best use in upcoming hackathons.

title: 为什么英国无法通过协助自杀法案？
content: Britain cannot pass an assisted‑dying bill largely because of deep legal, ethical, and political opposition. The UK’s legal system treats the act of assisting suicide as murder, and the human rights framework demands robust safeguards. Public opinion is split, with many fearing a “slippery slope” toward abuse or pressure on vulnerable people. Politicians avoid the issue to maintain public trust, and without a clear, widely supported framework the government cannot garner parliamentary approval.
eventKey: 为什么英国无法通过协助自杀法案
normalizedTitle: 为什么英国无法通过协助自杀法案

title: WIKI 知识库 v1.0.0 正式发布
content:
应用介绍 WIKI 知识库是一款本地优先的智能知识管理服务，专为需要高效组织、检索和利用知识资源的个人及团队设计。该知识库提供了从文档解析到智能问答的全链路解决方案，主要面向以下用户群体：

需要管理大量文档的技术团队

希望建立企业知识库的组织

title: 为什么 RSA 证书在新版 OpenSSH 上认证失败？ russh 库 0.59 协议编码的两层坑
content: I fixed a compatibility bug in the russh 0.59 library that caused RSA SHA‑2 authentication to fail on OpenSSH 8.2+. OpenSSH no longer accepts the legacy ssh‑rsa algorithm, so client‑side key, agent, and certificate authentication must use rsa‑sha2‑256 or rsa‑sha2‑512. The issue was twofold: russh encoded certificates with the old algorithm name and omitted the required prefix in the signature packet. After correcting the algorithm name and signature format, all authentication paths worked, and I tested them against a real OpenSSH server.
eventKey: 为什么-rsa-证书在新版-openssh-上认证失败-russh
normalizedTitle: 为什么 rsa 证书在新版 openssh 上认证失败 russh 库 0 59 协议编码的两层坑

title: 由人工智能生成的微剧正在颠覆中国的娱乐产业
content: AI-generated micro-dramas are transforming China’s entertainment industry by offering rapid, low-cost production of short, web‑based shows that resonate with domestic audiences. These clips, produced entirely with artificial intelligence, can be produced quickly and tailored to current trends, enabling creators to release fresh content regularly. The trend disrupts traditional media workflows, lowers entry barriers for small production teams, and aligns with China’s strong online video consumption habits.

title: 欣旺达装车特斯拉，供应全球车型｜36氪独家
content: Tesla has added Xinwangda Power as its fifth global battery supplier. Xinwangda’s cells, produced in Yiwu, Zhejiang, have shipped to Tesla’s Shanghai plant for export‑only models, with domestic use pending after a typical one‑year trial. The deal marks Tesla’s effort to diversify its battery supply beyond CATL, Panasonic, LG, and BYD, aiming to reduce costs. Tesla purchases cells while assembling modules and packs itself, enabling tighter control over pricing and facilitating high‑rate fast‑charging materials supplied by Xinwangda.

title: 非 AI 相关的开源项目：断断续续写的一个可以用于生产环境源码级别调试的工具，最近又迭代了一版
content: GhostScope is a personal, open‑source debugging toolkit for production‑level source‑level tracing, originally built for C. It underwent a recent update to the latest gimli library, fixing DWARF handling and improving its ability to track optimized code, including inline functions. The project now focuses on a command‑line interface with an AI‑assisted script generator, reducing the need to learn its custom scripting language. The author invites collaborators to extend support to Rust and async features.

title: 印度的宗教少数群体面临更严厉的反改教法
content: India has tightened its anti‑conversion laws, increasing penalties for religious conversion and placing stricter restrictions on minorities. The government now imposes harsher sanctions, including higher fines and longer prison terms, for those encouraging or facilitating conversion. These measures are intended to curb proselytizing activities and are expected to disproportionately affect non‑majority religious groups, limiting their freedom to practice or change faith.

content:
4月8日至10日，第35届北京教育装备展示会在北京展览馆举办。开源中国作为支持单位深度参与本届展会，旗下北京奥思研工智能科技有限公司同时承担“数智化赋能高等教育发展论坛”支持工作与“人工智能赋能教育创新实践论坛”承办工作。以此为契机，开源中国正式对外传递教育业务战略升级的明确信号——从工具与社区服务者，向覆盖K12至高等教育全学段的AI基础设施与人才培养方案提供商全面演进。

title: TimescaleDB 2.26.2 发布，基于 PostgreSQL 的时序数据库
content:
TimescaleDB 是一个开源数据库，旨在使 SQL 可扩展到时间序列数据，基于 PostgreSQL 构建的，并打包为 PostgreSQL 扩展程序，提供跨时间和空间的自动分区，以及完整的 SQL 支持。 TimescaleDB 2.26.2 现已发布，此版本修复了自 2.26.1 版本以来存在的错误。官方建议尽快升级。

错误修复

#9460 修复EXPLAIN中直接压缩的 WA 记录跟踪的问题
#9485 修复tsl_compressor_free中无效化操作的 use-after-free 问题
#9486 修复 job owner…

title: Hermes Agent 与 OpenClaw：开源 AI 智能体的两种设计哲学
content:
2026 年，开源 AI 智能体领域迎来了一场静悄悄的革命。当 OpenClaw 以 20 万+ GitHub Stars 的惊人速度席卷开发者社区时，Nous Research 推出的 Hermes Agent 正在用另一种方式重新定义"智能体"的含义——不是更强大的工具，而是会自我进化的数字同事。 两种截然不同的设计哲学

OpenClaw 诞生于 2025 年末，是一个基于 TypeScript/Node.js 构建的社区驱动项目。它的核心架构围绕一个中央 Gateway 展开：这个控制平面负责消息路由、会话管理、工具执行和状态维护…

title: 建博会 | 东软双轮驱动绘就大健康蓝图，实践赋能产业高质量发展
content:
4月8日，第八届世界大健康博览会在武汉举办。东软集团联席总裁盖龙佳受邀出席并发表主旨演讲。他指出，随着中国经济向智能化时代全面跃迁，AI正从单纯的效率工具走向参与生产、运营和决策全过程的系统能力，医疗健康领域正迎来价值重塑的历史性机遇。 东软以智能化和数据为核心，用数智技术赋能，围绕“AI+医疗”、数据价值化及大健康产业展开战略布局和卓有成效的实践探索，为产业高质量发展提供了可落地的“东软方案”。

数智赋能破局 精准破解多重挑战

盖龙佳指出，智能化时代下AI与社会生产生活已深度融合。AI的发展离不开数据、算力、算法的支撑…

content: The article discusses that while a ceasefire between the US and Iran could mitigate a new severe threat to the global economy, it would introduce a different challenge for the Federal Reserve. This shift suggests that the prospects for a U.S. rate cut have become dimmer, as the Fed must now contend with new uncertainties stemming from the geopolitical situation.
